subcodes.first_line: In this day the denizens of the Supreme Concourse and the exalted Paradise consort with one another in utmost joy, rapture, gladness and felicity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز اهل ملا اعلی و جنت علیا بکمال بهجت و نشاط و فرح و انبساط با هم معاشرند
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @soul; spirit after death, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
